candidates.why: Exact total current assets line on the balance sheet; best match for ACT.

candidates.row_label: Current assets excluding cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Current assets subtotal excluding cash, but ACT requires total current assets, so this is not preferred.
Balancing line, not a reported total.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line and wrong section.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; best match for CHE.
Can represent cash, but not necessarily the full cash and cash equivalents definition and appears secondary to the explicit cash line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash-flow statement ending cash line matches conceptually, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Wrong period point for balance-sheet CHE.

candidates.row_label: Current assets excluding cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Explicitly excludes cash.

candidates.row_label: Exchange rate differences in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Not a stock balance.
Not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Adjustment for non-cash items - Balancing value
candidates.why: Not cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the explicit balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents row.

candidates.why: Exact total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; best match for LCT.
Only one component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Balancing line and wrong section.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Exact current portion of debt excluding leases; matches baseline STD definition and explicitly excludes capitalized leases.
Current debt-like liability but explicitly lease-related, which baseline STD excludes.
Current liabilities category, not short-term debt.
Operating liability, not debt.
Tax liability, not debt.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Clean explicit STD line found; lease liabilities excluded per label.

candidates.why: Exact current tax payable/current tax liabilities line; best match for TXP.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit current tax liabilities row.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet PPE line; represents property, plant and equipment/tangible fixed assets and is preferable to cash-flow rows or lease-specific rows.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Lease/right-of-use asset line, not preferred for baseline PPE when a broader tangible fixed assets line exists.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Gross lease asset line, not preferred to total/net tangible fixed assets.
Balancing-value artifact rather than the cleaner reported line.
Cash-flow capex line, not balance-sheet PPE stock.
Cash-flow transaction, not PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Profit -) / loss () on sales of tangible assets
candidates.why: Income/cash-flow adjustment, not PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Used the broad balance-sheet tangible fixed assets line as the closest reported PPE measure.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet; best match for AT.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activit ies after changes in working capital
candidates.why: Best match for net cash flow from operating activities / operating cash flow; this is the post-working-capital operating cash flow line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before change in working capital - Balancing value
candidates.why: Candidate list item, but it is a balancing-value line and also pre-working-capital, so not the preferred net operating cash flow measure.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activit ies before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working-capital movements, not the final net CFO line when a post-working-capital line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activit ies after changes in working capital

variables.notes: Chose a label outside the shortlist because it is the clear final operating cash flow line and better matches OANCF than the balancing-value candidate.
